ast.name: textContent
textContent
alert
ast.source: Invalid JSON format for headers. Please correct and try again.
ast.target: 头部的 JSON 格式无效。请更正后重试。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Added MCP server integration for external tool connections.
ast.target: 新增了用于外部工具连接的 MCP 服务器集成。

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 新增了 Arize AI Phoenix 遥测功能。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: More documentation and information on these features is forthcoming.
ast.target: 更多关于这些功能的文档和信息即将推出。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Check settings for configuration and join our
ast.target: 请查看设置进行配置，并加入我们的

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: There's a ton of new stuff in this update, including:
ast.target: 此次更新包含大量新功能，包括：

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 👁️ 内置 LLM 视觉功能

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 🔧 新的 Action 节点特性

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: We rewrote a lot of core cannoli code to support this release,
ast.target: 我们重写了大量 Cannoli 核心代码以支持此版本，

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: so if anything is broken, or you just wanna hang out with us,
ast.target: 所以如果出现任何问题，或者你只是想和我们聊聊，

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: let us know on the discord here:
ast.target: 请在此处的 Discord 上告诉我们：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Could not parse message into JSON:
ast.target: 无法将消息解析为 JSON：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot write after close. Assign an onready handler.
ast.target: 关闭后无法写入。请分配一个 onready 处理程序。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 无法刷新 OAuth 令牌：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Accessing resource attributes before async attributes settled
ast.target: 在异步属性确定之前访问资源属性

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error while trying to shutdown current span processor
ast.target: 尝试关闭当前 span 处理器时出错

ast.name: error
ast.source: This group overlaps with another object. Please ensure objects fully enclose their members.
ast.target: 此组与另一个对象重叠。请确保对象完全包含其成员。

ast.name: error
ast.source: A path leaving this group and re-enters it, this would cause deadlock.
ast.target: 一条路径离开此组后又重新进入，这将导致死锁。

ast.name: error
ast.source: List edges can't cross into parallel groups. Try putting the node it's coming from inside the parallel group or using a non-list edge and an intermediary node.
ast.target: 列表边不能跨越进入并行组。尝试将其来源节点放入并行组内，或使用非列表边和一个中介节点。

ast.name: error
ast.source: List edges can't cross between parallel groups.
ast.target: 列表边不能在并行组之间跨越。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Parallel groups must have at least one incoming list arrow (cyan, labeled).
ast.target: 并行组必须至少有一个传入的列表箭头（青色，带标签）。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Parallel groups can't have more than one incoming list arrow.
ast.target: 并行组不能有超过一个传入的列表箭头。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Repeat groups loops must have a valid number in their label. Please ensure the label is a positive integer.
ast.target: 重复组循环的标签中必须有一个有效的数字。请确保标签是一个正整数。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Repeat groups can't have incoming edges of type list.
ast.target: 重复组不能有列表类型的传入边。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Repeat groups can't have any outgoing edges.
ast.target: 重复组不能有任何传出边。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Nodes can't have any incoming list edges.
ast.target: 节点不能有任何传入的列表边。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Provided schema is not a ZodObject.
ast.target: 提供的 schema 不是 ZodObject。

ast.name: error
ast.source: No messages to send to LLM. Empty call nodes only send the message history they've been passed.
ast.target: 没有要发送给 LLM 的消息。空的调用节点只发送它们接收到的消息历史。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error calling LLM: no stream returned.
ast.target: 调用 LLM 时出错：未返回流。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error calling LLM: no message returned.
ast.target: 调用 LLM 时出错：未返回消息。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Choice function call has no arguments.
ast.target: 选择函数调用没有参数。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Choice function call has invalid arguments.
ast.target: 选择函数调用参数无效。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Choice nodes must have at least one outgoing choice edge.
ast.target: 选择节点必须至少有一个传出的选择边。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Form function call has no arguments.
ast.target: 表单函数调用没有参数。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Named output nodes cannot be inside of parallel groups.
ast.target: 命名输出节点不能位于并行组内。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid reference. Could not find selection.

ast.name: error
ast.source: Dynamic reference did not process correctly.

ast.name: error
ast.source: Could not find arrow containing note name.
ast.target: 找不到包含笔记名称的箭头。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Note name arrow has invalid content.
ast.target: 笔记名称箭头内容无效。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 找不到子 Cannoli 画布。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 启用 Phoenix 追踪时出错

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Cycle detected in graph. Please make sure the graph is a DAG.
(exception: edges between groups and their members)
ast.target: 图中检测到环。请确保图是一个 DAG。\n（例外：组与其成员之间的边）

ast.name: error
ast.target: 解析 Cannoli JSON 失败：

ast.name: error
ast.target: 解析 JSON 选项失败：

ast.name: error
ast.target: 未找到 Smart Connections 插件

ast.name: error
ast.source: An error occurred while fetching frontmatter:
ast.target: 获取 frontmatter 时发生错误：

ast.name: error
ast.source: An error occurred while editing frontmatter:
ast.target: 编辑 frontmatter 时发生错误：

ast.name: error
ast.target: 保存 MCP 设置失败：

ast.name: log
ast.source: [WARNING]: Received non-string content from OpenAI. This is currently not supported.
ast.target: [警告]：从 OpenAI 收到非字符串内容。目前不支持此操作。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Failed to parse error response as JSON
ast.target: 将错误响应解析为 JSON 失败

ast.name: log
ast.source: Failed to get text from error response
ast.target: 从错误响应中获取文本失败

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在从服务器断开连接

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: (Optional) This base URL will be used to make all Anthropic LLM calls. If you are using the former ValTown proxy workaround, please clear this field.
ast.target: （可选）此基础URL将用于所有Anthropic LLM调用。如果您之前使用了ValTown代理解决方案，请清除此字段。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This key will be used to make all Anthropic LLM calls. Be aware that complex cannolis, can be expensive to run.
ast.target: 此密钥将用于所有Anthropic LLM调用。请注意，复杂的cannoli运行成本可能很高。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This model will be used for all LLM nodes unless overridden with a config arrow.
ast.target: 此模型将用于所有LLM节点，除非使用配置箭头覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This temperature will be used for all LLM nodes unless overridden with a config arrow.
ast.target: 此温度将用于所有LLM节点，除非使用配置箭头覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This key will be used to make all Azure OpenAI LLM calls. Be aware that complex cannolis, can be expensive to run.
ast.target: 此密钥将用于所有Azure OpenAI LLM调用。请注意，复杂的cannoli运行成本可能很高。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This deployment will be used to make all Azure OpenAI LLM calls.
ast.target: 此部署将用于所有Azure OpenAI LLM调用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This instance will be used to make all Azure OpenAI LLM calls.
ast.target: 此实例将用于所有Azure OpenAI LLM调用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This version will be used to make all Azure OpenAI LLM calls. Be aware that complex cannolis, can be expensive to run.
ast.target: 此版本将用于所有Azure OpenAI LLM调用。请注意，复杂的cannoli运行成本可能很高。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This url will be used to make azure openai llm calls against a different endpoint. This is useful for switching to an azure enterprise endpoint, or, some other openai compatible service.
ast.target: 此URL将用于针对不同端点进行Azure OpenAI LLM调用。这对于切换到Azure企业端点或其他兼容OpenAI的服务很有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This key will be used to make all Gemini LLM calls. Be aware that complex cannolis, can be expensive to run.
ast.target: 此密钥将用于所有Gemini LLM调用。请注意，复杂的cannoli运行成本可能很高。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This key will be used to make all Groq LLM calls. Be aware that complex cannolis, can be expensive to run.
ast.target: 此密钥将用于所有Groq LLM调用。请注意，复杂的cannoli运行成本可能很高。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This url will be used to make all ollama LLM calls. Be aware that ollama models have different features and capabilities that may not be compatible with all features of cannoli.
ast.target: 此URL将用于所有Ollama LLM调用。请注意，Ollama模型具有不同的功能和特性，可能与cannoli的所有功能不兼容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This model will be used for all LLM nodes unless overridden with a config arrow. (Note that special arrow types rely on function calling, which is not available in all models.)
ast.target: 此模型将用于所有LLM节点，除非使用配置箭头覆盖。（请注意，特殊箭头类型依赖于函数调用，并非所有模型都支持。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This key will be used to make all openai LLM calls. Be aware that complex cannolis, especially those with many GPT-4 calls, can be expensive to run.
ast.target: 此密钥将用于所有OpenAI LLM调用。请注意，复杂的cannoli，尤其是那些包含多次GPT-4调用的，运行成本可能很高。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If the cannoli you are about to run is estimated to make more than this amount of AI requests, you will be alerted before running it.
ast.target: 如果您即将运行的cannoli预计会发出超过此数量的AI请求，您将在运行前收到警报。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This url will be used to make openai llm calls against a different endpoint. This is useful for switching to an azure enterprise endpoint, or, some other openai compatible service.
ast.target: 此URL将用于针对不同端点进行OpenAI LLM调用。这对于切换到Azure企业端点或其他兼容OpenAI的服务很有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which provider settings to edit. This dropdown will also select your default provider, which can be overridden at the node level using config arrows.
ast.target: 选择要编辑的提供商设置。此下拉菜单还将选择您的默认提供商，该提供商可以在节点级别使用配置箭头覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The maximum number of LLM calls that can be made at once. Decrease this if you are running into rate limiting issues.
ast.target: 可以同时进行的最大LLM调用次数。如果您遇到速率限制问题，请降低此值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable vision for LLM calls. This will allow the LLM to see images embedded with markdown embedding syntax (e.g. ![[image.png]] or ![description](image-link.com)). This setting can be overridden at the node level using a 'enableVision' config arrow with the value 'true' or 'false'.
ast.target: 为LLM调用启用视觉功能。这将允许LLM查看使用Markdown嵌入语法嵌入的图像（例如 ![[image.png]] 或 ![描述](image-link.com)）。此设置可以在节点级别使用值为 'true' 或 'false' 的 'enableVision' 配置箭头覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle this if you'd like colorless (grey) nodes to be interpreted as content nodes rather than call nodes. Purple nodes will then be interpreted as call nodes.
ast.target: 如果您希望无色（灰色）节点被解释为内容节点而非调用节点，请切换此选项。紫色节点随后将被解释为调用节点。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle this if you'd like to only run canvases that have one or more 'cannoli' labeled groups. Use this if you want to ensure you never run a canvas as a cannoli unless you've explicitly defined the parts of the canvas you want to be interpreted as a cannoli.
ast.target: 如果您希望仅运行包含一个或多个 'cannoli' 标签组的画布，请切换此选项。如果您想确保除非明确将画布的某些部分定义为cannoli，否则绝不将画布作为cannoli运行，请使用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When extracting a note in a cannoli, include the filename as a top-level header. This default can be overridden by adding "#" or "!#" after the note link in a reference like this: {{[[Stuff]]#}} or {{[[Stuff]]!#}}.
ast.target: 在cannoli中提取笔记时，默认将文件名作为顶级标题包含在内。可以通过在引用中的笔记链接后添加 \"#\" 或 \"!#\" 来覆盖此默认值，例如：{{[[Stuff]]#}} 或 {{[[Stuff]]!#}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When extracting or editing a note in a cannoli, include the note's properties (YAML frontmatter). This default can be overridden by adding "^" or "!^" after the note link in a reference like this: {{[[Stuff]]^}} or {{[[Stuff]]!^}}.
ast.target: 在cannoli中提取或编辑笔记时，默认包含笔记的属性（YAML前置数据）。可以通过在引用中的笔记链接后添加 \"^\" 或 \"!^\" 来覆盖此默认值，例如：{{[[Stuff]]^}} 或 {{[[Stuff]]!^}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When extracting or editing a note in a cannoli, include the note's markdown link above the content. This default can be overridden by adding "@" or "!@" after the note link in a reference like this: {{[[Stuff]]@}} or {{[[Stuff]]!@}}.
ast.target: 在cannoli中提取或编辑笔记时，默认在内容上方包含笔记的Markdown链接。可以通过在引用中的笔记链接后添加 \"@\" 或 \"!@\" 来覆盖此默认值，例如：{{[[Stuff]]@}} 或 {{[[Stuff]]!@}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This string will be used to format chat messages when using chat arrows. This string must contain the placeholders {{role}} and {{content}}, which will be replaced with the role and content of the message, respectively.
ast.target: 此字符串将用于在使用聊天箭头时格式化聊天消息。此字符串必须包含占位符 {{role}} 和 {{content}}，它们将分别被替换为消息的角色和内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Move the cursor forward every time a token is streamed in from a chat arrow. This will lock the scroll position to the bottom of the note.
ast.target: 每当从聊天箭头流式传输一个token时，将光标向前移动。这会将滚动位置锁定在笔记底部。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable cannolis to be triggered by audio recordings. When you make a recording in a note with a cannoli property: (1) The audio file will be transcribed using Whisper. (2) The file reference will be replaced with the transcript. (3) The cannoli defined in the property will run.
ast.target: 启用cannoli由音频录音触发。当您在具有cannoli属性的笔记中进行录音时：(1) 音频文件将使用Whisper转录。(2) 文件引用将被替换为转录文本。(3) 属性中定义的cannoli将运行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use this prompt to guide the style and vocabulary of the transcription. (i.e. the level of punctuation, format and spelling of uncommon words in the prompt will be mimicked in the transcription)
ast.target: 使用此提示来指导转录的风格和词汇。（即提示中的标点符号级别、格式和不常见单词的拼写将在转录中被模仿）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: After a recording is transcribed, delete the audio file.
ast.target: 录音转录完成后，删除音频文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: These secrets will be available in all of your cannolis, using "{{secret name}}". They are not stored in the canvas, and wil not be included when you bake a cannoli.
ast.target: 这些密钥将在您所有的cannoli中可用，使用 \"{{secret name}}\"。它们不存储在画布中，也不会包含在您烘焙cannoli时。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The path to the folder where baked cannoli will be saved. There can be subfolders.
ast.target: 烘焙后的cannoli将保存到的文件夹路径。可以包含子文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This key will be used to create Vals on your Val Town account when you run the "Create Val" command.
ast.target: 当您运行 \"创建Val\" 命令时，此密钥将用于在您的Val Town账户上创建Val。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: View information about your Cannoli Vals. This modal can also be opened using the "View vals" command.
ast.target: 查看有关您的Cannoli Val的信息。此模态框也可以使用 \"查看Val\" 命令打开。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Manage default HTTP templates for action nodes.
ast.target: 管理操作节点的默认HTTP模板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable Phoenix tracing for your Cannoli runs. Phoenix is a data tracing platform that allows you to observe the history of your runs, and optimize your prompts over time.
ast.target: 为您的Cannoli运行启用Phoenix追踪。Phoenix是一个数据追踪平台，允许您观察运行历史，并随时间优化您的提示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the project to use for your Phoenix traces. This is used to identify the project in the Phoenix UI.
ast.target: 用于您的Phoenix追踪的项目名称。这用于在Phoenix UI中标识项目。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The base URL for your Phoenix traces. This is used to identify your Phoenix server.
ast.target: 您的Phoenix追踪的基础URL。这用于标识您的Phoenix服务器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: (optional) The API key to use. Generate one in the Phoenix UI system settings if authentication is enabled.
ast.target: （可选）要使用的API密钥。如果启用了身份验证，请在Phoenix UI系统设置中生成一个。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether connection to a Cannoli server is enabled.
ast.target: 是否启用连接到Cannoli服务器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The secret of your Cannoli server.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The URL of your Cannoli server.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Check the status of your Cannoli server.
ast.target: 检查您的Cannoli服务器的状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a folder of sample cannolis to your vault to walk you through the basics of Cannoli. (Delete and re-add this folder to get the latest version after an update.)
ast.target: 将一个包含示例cannoli的文件夹添加到您的保险库中，以引导您了解Cannoli的基础知识。（更新后，删除并重新添加此文件夹以获取最新版本。）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: Azure OpenAI API 部署名称

ast.name: setName
ast.target: Azure OpenAI API 实例名称

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Parse colorless nodes as content nodes
ast.target: 将无色节点解析为内容节点

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Only run canvases with a 'cannoli' group
ast.target: 仅运行带有 'cannoli' 组的画布

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Include filenames as headers in extracted notes by default
ast.target: 默认在提取的笔记中包含文件名作为标题

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Include properties when extracting or editing notes by default
ast.target: 默认在提取或编辑笔记时包含属性

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Include markdown links when extracting or editing notes by default
ast.target: 默认在提取或编辑笔记时包含Markdown链接

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启用音频录音器触发的cannoli

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter prompt to improve transcription accuracy
ast.target: 输入提示以提高转录准确性

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [警告]：LangSmith 收到了无法序列化的值。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [WARNING]: LangSmith received circular JSON. This will decrease tracer performance.
ast.target: [警告]：LangSmith 收到了循环 JSON。这会降低追踪器性能。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [WARNING]: LangSmith failed to fetch info on supported operations. Falling back to batch operations and default limits.
ast.target: [警告]：LangSmith 获取支持操作信息失败。将回退到批量操作和默认限制。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [WARNING]: When tracing in manual flush mode, you must call `await client.flush()` manually to submit trace batches.
ast.target: [警告]：在手动刷新模式下进行追踪时，您必须手动调用 `await client.flush()` 来提交追踪批次。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Provided runId will be used only for the first element of the batch.
ast.target: 提供的 runId 将仅用于批次中的第一个元素。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed to calculate number of tokens, falling back to approximate count
ast.target: 计算 token 数量失败，将回退到近似计数。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: response.functionCall() is deprecated. Use response.functionCalls() instead.
ast.target: response.functionCall() 已弃用。请改用 response.functionCalls()。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The "tool_calls" field on a message is only respected if content is a string.
ast.target: 消息上的 \"tool_calls\" 字段仅在内容为字符串时才被识别。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: OpenAI may not support records in schemas! Try an array of key-value pairs instead.
ast.target: 警告：OpenAI 可能不支持模式中的记录！请尝试使用键值对数组。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: OpenAI may not support schemas with unions as roots! Try wrapping it in an object property.
ast.target: 警告：OpenAI 可能不支持以联合类型作为根的模式！请尝试将其包装在对象属性中。

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
[WARN]: 'NodeInterrupt' thrown in conditional edge. This is likely a bug in your graph implementation.
NodeInterrupt should only be thrown inside a node, not in edge conditions.
ast.target: [警告]：在条件边中抛出了 'NodeInterrupt'。这很可能是您图实现中的一个错误。\nNodeInterrupt 应仅在节点内部抛出，而非在边条件中。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Adding an edge to a graph that has already been compiled. This will not be reflected in the compiled graph.
ast.target: 向已编译的图添加边。此更改不会反映在已编译的图中。

ast.name: warn

ast.name: text
ast.source: A restart is required for changes in this section to take effect.
ast.target: 此部分的更改需要重启才能生效。

ast.name: text
ast.source:
Cannoli Server is a standalone program that you can run alongside Cannoli in Obsidian.

It allows extended Cannoli functionality by offloading long-running tasks, like MCP servers, to a separate process.
ast.target:
卡诺利服务器是一个独立程序，您可以在 Obsidian 中与卡诺利一起运行。

它通过将长时间运行的任务（如 MCP 服务器）卸载到单独的进程，从而扩展卡诺利的功能。

ast.name: text
ast.source: See the docs here for more information.
ast.target: 更多信息请参阅此处文档。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can run the latest version of Cannoli Server by running the command below:
ast.target: \n您可以通过运行以下命令来运行最新版本的卡诺利服务器：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Current configuration of your Cannoli server.
ast.target: 您当前卡诺利服务器的配置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Edit your MCP server configurations. Each row represents one server configuration.
ast.target: 编辑您的 MCP 服务器配置。每行代表一个服务器配置。
